channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ENERGYINF] Energy Infrastructure Trust: Sponsor Rapid Holdings 2 Pte. Ltd. Discloses Material Issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Energy Infrastructure Trust has informed the stock exchange about a material issue. Rapid Holdings 2 Pte. Ltd., the Trust's sponsor, has disclosed the sale of units of the Trust on March 25, 27, and 30, 2026. The sale resulted in a decrease in Rapid Holdings 2 Pte. Ltd.'s holding from 41.9% to 39.12%. The transaction was conducted on the BSE Limited in Singapore. This disclosure is in accordance with Regulation 17.4.1 of the Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading.

  • Energy Infrastructure Trust's sponsor, Rapid Holdings 2 Pte. Ltd., disclosed the sale of units of the Trust.
  • The sale occurred on March 25, 27, and 30, 2026.
  • The sale resulted in a decrease in Rapid Holdings 2 Pte. Ltd.'s holding from 41.9% to 39.12%.
  • The transaction was conducted on the BSE Limited in Singapore.
  • The disclosure is in accordance with Regulation 17.4.1 of the Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Energy Infrastructure Trust | Category: Deals

item.title: [METAINFO] Meta Infotech Ltd Secures Rs. 0.70 Crores in Fresh and Renewal Orders
item.description:
Meta Infotech Ltd has announced the receipt of fresh and renewal orders amounting to Rs. 0.70 crores from a financial services industry. The orders are for annual subscription and one-time implementation support for the period from 1st April, 2026 to 31st March, 2027 and 1st March 2026 to 28th February, 2027 respectively. The orders are in the ordinary course of business and are expected to be executed within 15 days.

  • Meta Infotech Ltd has secured fresh and renewal orders amounting to Rs. 0.70 crores.
  • The orders are from a financial services industry for annual subscription and one-time implementation support.
  • The period of the orders is from 1st April, 2026 to 31st March, 2027 and 1st March 2026 to 28th February, 2027.
  • The orders are expected to be executed within 15 days.
  • The orders are in the ordinary course of business.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meta Infotech Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KRBL] KRBL Ltd Receives Tax Demand Order from Central Goods and Services Tax, Sangrur, Punjab
item.description:
KRBL Ltd has received an Order from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner, Central Goods and Services Tax, Sangrur, Punjab, under Section 74 of the Central Goods & Services Tax Act, 2017 (‘CGST Act’) and the Punjab Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 read with Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 for the Financial Year 2021-22. The Order raises a tax demand of Rs. 4,57,390 /- and penalty of Rs. 28,80,315 /-. The company intends to file for appeal in this regard with the Appropriate Authority. However, there is no significant impact on financial, operation or other activities of the company.

  • KRBL Ltd received a tax demand order from Central Goods and Services Tax, Sangrur, Punjab.
  • The Order was passed under Section 74 of the Central Goods & Services Tax Act, 2017 and the Punjab Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 read with Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 for the Financial Year 2021-22.
  • The Order raises a tax demand of Rs. 4,57,390 /- and penalty of Rs. 28,80,315 /-.
  • The company intends to file for appeal in this regard with the Appropriate Authority.
  • There is no significant impact on financial, operation or other activities of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRBL LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [KBCGLOBAL] Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for FY2026
item.description:
Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, until the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This decision is independent of any other trading window closure notices and is not intended to amend, alter, modify, curtail, or extend them.

  • Trading window closure for Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd for FY2026
  • Closure in effect from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Applies to all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Independent of any other trading window closure notices
  • Not intended to amend, alter, modify, curtail, or extend any other notices

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KBC Global Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SERVOTEACH] Lexoraa Industries Ltd Amends Memorandum of Association, Increases Authorized Share Capital
item.description:
Lexoraa Industries Ltd has announced an amendment in its Memorandum of Association (MOA) during the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EoGM) held on 31st March 2026. The shareholders have approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital from the existing Rs. 20,00,00,000/- (Twenty Crore) to 50,00,00,000/- (Fifty Crore). This alteration will result in the substitution of Clause V of the MOA with a new clause that states the authorized share capital as 50,00,00,000/- (Fifty Crore) consisting of 5,00,00,000 (Five crore) Equity Shares of Re.10/- (Rupee ten only) each.

  • Lexoraa Industries Ltd has amended its Memorandum of Association (MOA)
  • The company's authorized share capital has been increased from Rs. 20,00,00,000/- to 50,00,00,000/-
  • The decision was approved during the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EoGM) on 31st March 2026
  • The alteration will lead to the substitution of Clause V of the MOA
  • The new authorized share capital consists of 5,00,00,000 (Five crore) Equity Shares of Re.10/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Servoteach Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ALSTONE] Shanta Agencies Private Limited Acquires 2.07% Stake in Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd
item.description:
Shanta Agencies Private Limited has acquired a 2.07% stake in Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd. The acquisition was made through the purchase of 62,748,000 equity shares at a price of Re. 1 each. The total equity share capital of Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd before the acquisition was 627,480,000 equity shares, which increased to 690,228,000 equity shares after the acquisition. This represents a 5.23% increase in the total equity share capital of the company.

  • Shanta Agencies Private Limited has acquired a 2.07% stake in Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the purchase of 62,748,000 equity shares at a price of Re. 1 each
  • The total equity share capital of Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd before the acquisition was 627,480,000 equity shares
  • The total equity share capital of the company increased to 690,228,000 equity shares after the acquisition
  • This represents a 5.23% increase in the total equity share capital of Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Alstone Textiles (India) Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INDIGO] InterGlobe Aviation Appoints William Walsh as Chief Executive Officer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

InterGlobe Aviation Limited, the parent company of IndiGo, has appointed Mr. William Walsh as the Chief Executive Officer, subject to regulatory approvals. Mr. Walsh, who is currently the Director General of IATA, has previously held leadership roles at Aer Lingus, British Airways, and IAG. His tenure at IATA ends on July 31, 2026, and he is expected to join IndiGo no later than August 3, 2026. Mr. Walsh will be responsible for the overall management and strategic direction of the airline, focusing on transformational initiatives to strengthen operational performance, advance the company's network and commercial strategy, and enhance customer experience.

  • InterGlobe Aviation Limited has appointed Mr. William Walsh as the Chief Executive Officer of IndiGo.
  • Mr. Walsh is currently the Director General of IATA and has previously served as CEO of British Airways and IAG.
  • His tenure at IATA ends on July 31, 2026, and he is expected to join IndiGo no later than August 3, 2026.
  • Mr. Walsh will be responsible for the overall management and strategic direction of the airline.
  • His appointment is subject to regulatory approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: InterGlobe Aviation Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SETCO] Setco Automotive Receives Consent for Waiver of ₹66.46 Crore Investor IRR by Material Subsidiary
item.description:
Setco Automotive Ltd. has received consent for waiver of accrued Investor IRR by its material subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited (SASPL). The correct amount of accrued Investor IRR waived for the Financial Year 2025-26 is ₹66.46 crore (Rupees Sixty Six Crore and Forty Six Lakhs Only), contrary to the previously mentioned ₹75.50 crore. The Company has also received in-principle approval from BSE Limited in relation to this matter. This corrigendum is issued to rectify the error and inform the stakeholders.

  • Setco Automotive receives consent for waiver of ₹66.46 crore Investor IRR by its material subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited
  • Incorrect amount of accrued Investor IRR was previously disclosed, now rectified to ₹66.46 crore
  • Company has received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for the waiver
  • The waiver is for the Financial Year 2025-26
  • Corrigendum issued to rectify the error and inform stakeholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [GRWRHITECH] Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd. Disputes Rs. 18.37 Crore Income Tax Demand for AY 2020-21
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd. has received a notice of demand under section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, pertaining to Assessment Year 2020-21, raising a demand of Rs. 18.37 crores. The company believes it has strong merits to oppose this order, citing reasons such as not being given prior notice and the opportunity of being heard, as well as the credit of Minimum Alternate tax not being taken into account. The company intends to file a rectification application.

  • Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd. received a notice of demand from the Income Tax Department for Rs. 18.37 crores.
  • The demand is for Assessment Year 2020-21, but the company received the notice through email on 30th March 2026.
  • The company believes it has strong merits to oppose the order due to various discrepancies in the process and computation.
  • Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd. intends to file a rectification application to contest the order.
  • The company claims the financial implications of the order are not material as they believe the claims are not maintainable.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [PREMIER] Premier Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Premier Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the shares of the company. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, as amended, and the Company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading. The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the announcement of Financial Results for the Quarter & Year ended March 31, 2026 for all promoters, directors, officers, other designated persons and their immediate relatives.

  • Premier Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window.
  • The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, as amended, and the Company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading.
  • The trading window will be closed for all promoters, directors, officers, other designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of Financial Results for the Quarter & Year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER LTD. | Category: Business Update
